profiles.name: SideButton SWE Full Stack
profiles.description: SideButton MCP server + Chrome extension + knowledge packs.

profiles.name: SideButton SWE .NET
profiles.description: SWE Full Stack + the .NET 9 SDK. Add Docker + Postgres client for the full test stack.

profiles.name: SideButton SWE Android
profiles.description: SWE Full Stack + JDK 17, the Android SDK, and the Android Emulator (headless AVD for on-device UI discovery/testing, booted on demand via sb-avd-start; needs KVM). Requires a Large or larger machine — the Create-Agent wizard enforces it.

profiles.name: SideButton SWE Native
profiles.description: SideButton MCP server + Claude-native browser (no Chrome extension).
